nasb.text: All the cities which you shall give to the Levites shall be forty-eight cities, together with their pasture lands.

esv.text: All the cities that you give to the Levites shall be forty-eight, with their pasturelands.

cnv.text: 這樣，你們所要給利未人的城，共為四十八座，連城帶城郊都要給他們。

ccb.text: 共四十八座城邑，包括城周围的草场。
